description: autonomous-coding-toolkit lesson library — Army CALL OIL taxonomy (Observation/Insight/Lesson). Categories: silent-failures, async-traps, test-anti-patterns, integration-boundaries, resource-lifecycle, performance, specification-drift, context-retrieval, planning-control-flow.
skipReasons: Too project-specific (internal pipeline logic from source project)
Duplicate of existing lesson (mock.patch namespace already covered)
Planning/spec heuristics without concrete technical trigger
Requires JSX/component-level static analysis not triggerable via Bash/path patterns
notes: Numbered lessons 0001-0082 plus dated bash-specific lessons (2026-02-28-*). Cluster directories cluster-d (0080-0091), cluster-e (0084-0091), cluster-f (0088-0091) — agent planning/context/batching lessons, 11 of 12 added as sessionStart. One skipped (0087) as too project-specific to prompt caching internals.

description: Medium (Towards Deep Learning) — "A single CLAUDE.md file went viral — the reason is embarrassingly simple." Argues effective agent instructions come from explicit, disciplined directives (state assumptions, write minimal code, don't expand scope) rather than clever prompting. Yielded agent-behavior directive lessons on goal-setting and change-scoping discipline.
skipReasons: A 4th drafted lesson was rejected at intake — hint/guard with command/path patterns but no toolNames (a lesson can never fire without toolNames)
notes: Added as agent-behavior directives (session-start, always-on): state-assumptions-and-convert-vague-goal-9802, write-minimum-code-that-solves-the-probl-c264, only-change-what-the-task-requires-do-no-ec52. Shared and extracted Jun 6, 2026.
